name: SCC powered re-analysis: LOPO per-pair coverage x synergy interaction
status: PRE-REGISTERED SECONDARY RE-ANALYSIS — explicitly NOT the original frozen primary (which ran and failed on power at n=131 with ~5 pairs/tercile; that cannot be un-seen). This freezes a properly-powered estimand BEFORE touching any held-out coverage indicators.
motivation: The tercile design threw away power. Using all 131 doubles as the unit of analysis (not 3 terciles) with continuous synergy yields ~0.84 power at n=131 (agent power sim).
hypothesis: Vanilla split conformal under-covers high-synergy double perturbations; a leakage-safe synergy prior (SCC) reduces that synergy-dependence of miscoverage.
estimand: In a logistic regression of the per-pair coverage indicator (1=true y in interval) on CONTINUOUS leakage-safe synergy s_hat, with terms [method, s_hat, method x s_hat], the INTERACTION coefficient (SCC vs vanilla) is > 0 (one-sided): SCC's coverage-vs-synergy slope is less negative than vanilla's.
coverage_generation: Leave-one-pair-out (LOPO): 131 folds, each double held out exactly once; conformal calibration on the other 130 (60/40 predictor/calib split within them); interval = additive_pred +/- width; width constant (vanilla) or sigma(s_hat)*Q (SCC).
synergy_prior: s_hat = sum of the two single-perturbation effect magnitudes (SINGLES ONLY; never the double's measured outcome). Standardized.

inference.primary: synergy-label PERMUTATION of the interaction statistic (B=2000), exact finite-sample one-sided p
inference.secondary: pair-level CLUSTER BOOTSTRAP 95% CI on the interaction coefficient (B=2000)

clearing_criterion_WITHIN_TIER: CLEARS within-tier iff: interaction coeff > 0 at one-sided perm p<0.05 AND vanilla high-synergy (top-50%) coverage CI excludes nominal 0.90 from below AND SCC high-synergy coverage CI contains 0.90.
does_not_clear: interaction CI spans 0, OR SCC also under-covers high synergy, OR effect only appears after data-dependent choices not in this prereg.
explicit_ceiling: Passing this does NOT reach merit 80. 80='validated' implies generalization; this is ONE dataset (K562, one assay). Clearing this upgrades SCC from 'underpowered secondary' to 'well-powered on one dataset' — a within-tier credibility gain only. A 2nd combinatorial dataset (Replogle, GPU) remains REQUIRED for 80.
leakage_guards: LOPO removes test pair from its own calibration
permutation shuffles only the synergy covariate
prior never fit to coverage outcome
falsifiers: interaction CI spans 0 -> synergy conditioning does not reduce miscoverage slope
SCC under-covers high synergy too -> prior fails to fix
permuted synergy reproduces the interaction -> artifact
